externalSharingScenarios.subject: Invoice clarification for INV-FAK-2026-004817
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please review the attached invoice clarification for fictional vendor Luma Ridge Services. Use the vendor portal for payment changes; do not reply with banking details.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Invoice contains payment-like references and vendor financial metadata.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP policy for financial identifiers; external recipient warning; sensitivity label inheritance on attachments.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Correction: invoice attachment sent in error
externalSharingScenarios.body: The previous message included an attachment intended for another fictional vendor. Please delete it and disregard the message.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Accidental disclosure of multiple vendor invoices, accruals, and approval states.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP block or warn on external sharing of finance workbooks; auto-label Confidential; user justification capture.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Clean redline for Aurora Vale Systems MSA
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the approved customer-facing clean redline. Internal negotiation comments have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Contract material is confidential and may be confused with privileged internal redline.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Sensitivity label Confidential with external sharing allowed only to approved domains and expiring links.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Privileged matter document index for LEG-2044
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please confirm access to the restricted folder. Download should remain disabled unless explicitly approved.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Privileged legal matter metadata and fictional settlement context.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Highly Confidential label; encryption; named-user sharing; download blocked; access expiration.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Project Meadow follow-up materials
externalSharingScenarios.body: Thank you for the discovery session. Attached is the customer-safe proposal checklist and next steps.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Risk of attaching internal proposal checklist with pricing assumptions instead of sanitized version.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP rule for internal pricing keywords; trainable classifier for proposals; external recipient warning.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Blue Harbor renewal quote
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the customer-facing quote for your review. It excludes internal discount guidance and margin notes.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Potential confusion with internal renewal workbook containing discount thresholds.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Auto-label internal sales workbooks Confidential; block external sharing if internal discount keywords detected.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Sanitized diagnostic package for integration review
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the sanitized diagnostic package. Please use this version instead of any previous archive.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Engineering diagnostics may contain synthetic tokens, client IDs, architecture notes, or session IDs.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Endpoint DLP and cloud DLP for secret-like patterns; require business justification for external sharing.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Diagnostic upload for API Gateway issue
externalSharingScenarios.body: Uploading diagnostic files for review. Please confirm receipt and restrict access to the vendor support team.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Pre-sanitized package includes secret-like placeholder values and internal design comments.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Block upload to unmanaged domains when secret-like strings are detected; require label downgrade prevention.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Sample dataset for churn segmentation review
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please review the attached anonymized segment sample and confirm whether the format works for your analysis.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Dataset may accidentally include customer IDs, email-like values, or account-level prediction scores.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP rule for customer identifiers and email patterns; EDM-style matching for synthetic customer IDs; sharing approval workflow.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Aggregated model trends for evaluation
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the aggregated trend file. It does not include customer identifiers or account-level scores.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Risk of sending account-level prediction file instead of aggregated trends.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Label and DLP policy distinction between aggregated and customer-level analytics files.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Sanitized incident evidence summary SEC-2026-0519
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the sanitized evidence summary. Raw Activity Explorer exports remain internal.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw evidence may include user IDs, file paths, policy matches, and sensitive file names.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Sensitive label Highly Confidential for raw evidence; DLP block for raw exports; allow sanitized PDF to approved domain.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: DLP alert export for troubleshooting
externalSharingScenarios.body: Sharing alert context for troubleshooting. Please keep this within your security support team.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw DLP alert export contains employee IDs, destination mailbox, and sensitive file names.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Block external sharing of raw security evidence; require sanitized export workflow.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Update on support case SUP-60392
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the customer-safe response summary for your case. Internal investigation notes have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Risk of attaching internal case notes with verification details and troubleshooting comments.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP for support case identifiers and verification phrases; external sharing warning for internal case-note files.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Support transcript package for training review
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please use the attached sanitized package for training material preparation.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Training package could contain customer IDs, verification phrases, and internal notes if unsanitized.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Trainable classifier for support transcripts; DLP block until sanitized label is applied.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Milestone tracker for rollout coordination
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the external milestone tracker. Internal risk, budget, and contract notes have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Risk of sharing internal PMO tracker with budget variance and contract appendix references.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Label internal PMO trackers as Internal or Confidential; block external sharing of files containing budget variance keywords.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Steering committee deck for review
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please review the customer-safe deck before the steering meeting.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Wrong internal deck may expose RAID details, budget variance, and legal appendix references.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP rule for internal-only markers; label-based external sharing restrictions; user confirmation prompt.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Candidate status update for CND-90441
externalSharingScenarios.body: The candidate has completed the current screening step. We will share next steps after internal approval.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Risk of sharing candidate verification tracker containing fake identity-like values.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Block external sharing of candidate verification trackers; auto-label HR recruiting records Confidential.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Benefits enrollment correction summary
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please process the attached correction summary for the fictional employee record. Sensitive payroll routing fields have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Benefits and payroll documents may contain employee IDs and bank-like references.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP policy for employee IDs plus bank-like patterns; encryption for approved benefits partner domain.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Audit evidence summary for May accruals
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the summarized evidence pack. Raw ledger files remain in the internal audit workspace.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw finance ledger could expose invoice IDs, vendor payments, and approval gaps.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Label raw audit samples Confidential; restrict guest access to summarized evidence only.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Invoice control sample for review
externalSharingScenarios.body: The attached sanitized sample includes control outcomes without remittance-like values.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Original audit sample includes tax-like IDs and detailed invoice records.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP for tax-like identifiers and invoice collections; require approved sanitized derivative for external auditors.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Vendor collaboration access findings
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is a sanitized summary of external collaboration access findings for advisory review.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw access report exposes guest mailboxes, permissions, and control weaknesses.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Label access reports Confidential; restrict external sharing to sanitized summaries.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Draft data handling examples for awareness module
externalSharingScenarios.body: Please review the sanitized examples for the awareness module. All identifiers are placeholders.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Training examples could include sensitive-looking account, employee, or invoice patterns.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP policy for sensitive patterns; manual approval before sharing training datasets externally.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Customer-safe product review notes
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached are generalized product review notes. Transcript examples and customer identifiers have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Original model interpretation notes may contain support transcript snippets.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Trainable classifier for customer support transcripts; external sharing blocked unless sanitized label applied.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Restricted content inventory sample
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is a limited sample of content categories for implementation planning. It excludes file owners and sensitive paths.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Full restricted inventory discloses sensitive file names, owners, and risk scenarios.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Restrict full inventory as Confidential; permit sanitized category-only sample to approved partner.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Customer-safe demo activity map
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the customer-safe demo activity map for the upcoming session.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Internal activity scripts could reveal security control gaps or simulated incident details.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Separate public demo artifacts from internal scripts; label internal scripts Confidential.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Endpoint event summary for DEV-FIC-2219
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is a sanitized endpoint event summary. Raw file names and user IDs have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw endpoint timeline exposes user activity, sensitive file names, and device identifiers.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Block raw endpoint investigation exports externally; allow sanitized summaries to approved support domains.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Approved contract attachment package
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached are the approved customer/vendor-facing contract documents. Internal negotiation notes are excluded.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Potential inclusion of internal legal memo or negotiation strategy notes.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP and label-based restriction for files with internal-only legal comments; external domain allowlist.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Feature matrix minimization summary
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is a summary of feature minimization recommendations. The raw feature matrix is not included.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Raw feature matrix may contain customer IDs, payroll-like values, and personal-email-like fields.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: DLP for customer and employee patterns; prevent external sharing of raw feature matrix.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Executive sponsor call summary
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the customer-facing summary for our sponsor call. Internal risk scores and discount thresholds have been removed.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Internal retention brief contains customer risk scoring and discount thresholds.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Auto-label internal retention briefs Confidential; block external sharing of discount-threshold terms.

externalSharingScenarios.subject: Synthetic Purview activity test pack
externalSharingScenarios.body: Attached is the synthetic activity pack index for demo review. It contains fictional data only and excludes raw incident evidence.
externalSharingScenarios.riskReason: Even synthetic packs may include sensitive-looking patterns that can trigger DLP or confuse recipients.
externalSharingScenarios.recommendedPurviewControl: Apply Public or Internal label based on recipient; include fictional-data notice; DLP test-mode policy for known demo folder.

metadata.fictionalDataNotice: All people, organizations, customers, vendors, identifiers, invoices, incidents, financial references, and sensitive-looking values are fictional and intended only for controlled Microsoft 365 / Purview demo lab simulations.
